name: cloud-architecture seed: every seed defaults to daily frequency and validate-all recognises the new namespaces
command: n=$(grep -c '^  fetch_frequency: daily' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-architecture-sources.yaml"); [ "$n" = "12" ] || { echo "FAIL daily n=$n" 1>&2; exit 1; }; mkdir -p tree/aws && cp "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/aws/aws-well-architected.yaml" tree/aws/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" 2>val.txt; grep -q 'unknown top-level folder: aws' val.txt && { echo FAIL-aws-unknown 1>&2; exit 1; }; echo daily-and-known 1>&2
